plugin.name: timer
plugin.description: Timer/scheduler: timeouts, intervals, cancellation, and active timer listing

conventions.name: set_timeout
conventions.description: Set a one-shot timer that fires after a delay

conventions.name: set_interval
conventions.description: Set a recurring timer that fires at regular intervals

conventions.name: cancel
conventions.description: Cancel an active timer by handle

conventions.name: list_active
conventions.description: List all active (non-expired) timers with remaining time
